blockers.description: npm install fails on WSL NTFS mount (EACCES permissions) — pre-existing from Phase 03
blockers.workaround: Use Docker (docker-compose up) or run npm from native Linux path outside /mnt/d/

human_actions_pending.action: Browser UAT: /sprint?project=KEY (sprint cards, sidebar, pagination, active sprint auto-expand, completed sprints visible) AND /bug-report?project=KEY (hover donut arcs → tooltip shows label + %)
human_actions_pending.context: Sprint page had sync bugs — fixed this session. Need visual confirmation sprints load correctly. Donut tooltip hotfix needs visual confirmation.

decisions.decision: Board ID discovered fresh on each sync — not stored in sprints table
decisions.rationale: Simpler; board ID can change; not needed for display

decisions.decision: Export buttons are stubs (close menu only, no real download)
decisions.rationale: D-12 explicit; real export deferred to Phase 5
WSL2/Windows paths caused nested worktree commit pollution in previous run

decisions.decision: .claude/worktrees/ added to .gitignore and tracked files removed
decisions.rationale: Was missing; caused worktree directory tree to be tracked and committed

decisions.decision: BugReportPage donut tooltip: .donutTooltip CSS was entirely absent — added class (position:fixed, z-index:999) + cursor:pointer + hover stroke-width to match bug-report.html mockup
decisions.rationale: Hotfix; JSX logic was correct, only CSS was missing

decisions.decision: Sprint stats join changed from sprint_id to sprint_name
decisions.rationale: 71% of bugs have sprint_id=NULL (customfield_10020[0].id not always present); sprint_name is reliably populated in both tables
If Jira API fails but cached data exists, return it with stale:true so page is still useful

context_notes: Phase 04 execution complete (commits 6e9c2a0, 933bd72). This session fixed two bugs: (1) BugReportPage donut tooltip CSS was absent — added .donutTooltip class (d4ff9cb). (2) Sprint page sync not working — fixed Jira API state filter, changed SQL join from sprint_id to sprint_name, added graceful stale fallback, Dashboard sync now also fires sprint sync (c045b02). DB had 1330 bugs, 379 with sprint_id set, 0 in sprints table — sprints table will populate on first Refresh Data click. Code review and verification have NOT run. CRLF line ending changes in .planning/ files are unstaged and should NOT be committed.
